_doc: Prompt unifié construit par concaténation : {recipe_name} + base_style + ratio + per_cuisine_modifier
base_style: professional food photography, natural daylight, top-down or 45° angle, rustic wooden table, fresh herbs garnish, low-glycemic style, ultra-realistic, shallow depth of field, vibrant colors, magazine quality

per_cuisine_modifiers.italien: , Italian rustic trattoria style, olive oil drizzle
per_cuisine_modifiers.mediterraneen: , Mediterranean coastal style, lemon and herbs
per_cuisine_modifiers.asiatique: , Asian fusion presentation, chopsticks on the side
per_cuisine_modifiers.indien: , Indian thali style with copper utensils, warm spices visible
per_cuisine_modifiers.mexicain: , Mexican vibrant colors, fresh lime and cilantro
per_cuisine_modifiers.maghrebin: , North African tagine style, warm terracotta colors

negative_prompts: no plastic, no fast food, no garish colors, no text overlays, no logos, no people, no hands
